## Bloom Energy appears undervalued on cash flow metrics but expensive on a revenue basis

The cash-flow-cheap vs. sales-expensive tension is a common structural feature of energy infrastructure plays in the AI power build-out; understanding which metric drives the re-rating thesis is key before adding or trimming the name.

- Simplywall.st characterizes BE as cheap on a cash flow basis but pricey on a sales/revenue basis.
- The valuation split creates ambiguity for investors sizing the name relative to the AI power-demand thesis.
- No specific multiples, price targets, or financial figures are provided in the headline.
